definitions: A polyhedron with 32 faces (12 pentagonal and 20 hexagonal), 90 edges, and 60 vertices, formed by truncating the 12 vertices of an icosahedron.
The shape of a standard soccer ball.
examples: The C60 fullerene molecule has the structure of a truncated icosahedron.
Engineers designed the dome to resemble a truncated icosahedron.
Each face of the truncated icosahedron was painted a different color.
